title: Workflow types, ResumeCursorReconstructor, and ArgsPayloadBuilder
description: Add the new TS types (WorkflowArgs, WorkflowRunResult, ResumeCursor, ConformanceReport) and the host-side input plumbing. ResumeCursorReconstructor re-derives completed-sprint state from durable contract status + history for crash-safe resume. ArgsPayloadBuilder marshals config, principles, models, and lenses into one JSON-serializable WorkflowArgs, throwing MissingKnobError on an unset required knob, AgentCapError when the worst-case agent count (maxSprints × maxIterations × lenses) exceeds the 16/1000 caps, and NonSerializableArgError on a non-serializable model.

successCriteria.description: src/orchestrator/workflow/types.ts defines WorkflowArgs, WorkflowRunResult, ResumeCursor, and ConformanceReport exactly per the architecture data model, reusing frozen PlanSpec/SprintContract/EvalResult/HistoryEntry types from src/contracts/.

ResumeCursorReconstructor.reconstruct(projectRoot, specId) returns a ResumeCursor whose completedSprintNumbers are derived from durable contract status (status passed/completed) via loadHistory + contract reads; with no history it returns completedSprintNumbers:[]; when contract status disagrees with history it trusts contract status. Unit tests cover all three.

ArgsPayloadBuilder.build(userPrompt, config, cursor) returns a fully JSON-serializable WorkflowArgs (JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(args)) deep-equals args), with knobs/models/evaluatorLenses populated from config (lenses from config.evaluator.strategies or a sensible default).

build throws MissingKnobError when a required knob is unset, AgentCapError when maxSprints × maxIterations × lenses > 16 concurrent or > 1000 total (computed worst-case, pre-invoke), and NonSerializableArgError on a non-serializable model value; each path has a unit test.
npm run typecheck and npm run build exit 0 and the new suites are green.

nonGoals: Do not write bober-pipeline.js or the RunResultFlusher (sprint 5) or the WorkflowEngine (sprint 6).
Do not perform any agent dispatch.
Do not change the contracts protocol or history schema; only read them.
Do not introduce SDK types into these modules.
stopConditions: Stop when types compile, reconstruct and build behave per criteria with green tests, and typecheck/build pass.
Stop when changes are confined to new files under src/orchestrator/workflow/ (types.ts, resume-cursor.ts, args-builder.ts, errors.ts, and their tests).
definitionOfDone: Workflow types are defined reusing frozen contract types; ResumeCursorReconstructor crash-safely re-derives completed sprints from durable status+history; ArgsPayloadBuilder emits a JSON-serializable WorkflowArgs and throws the three typed errors (MissingKnob/AgentCap/NonSerializableArg) at build time; unit tests cover every branch; typecheck and build are green.
assumptions: Lenses default to a single 'default' lens when config.evaluator.strategies implies one evaluator pass; multiple lenses can be derived from strategies or an explicit evaluatorLenses config if present.
Worst-case agent count uses sprint.maxSprints and evaluator.maxIterations as upper bounds since actual sprint count is unknown pre-plan.
loadHistory exists at src/state/history.ts and contract reads are available via src/state/sprint-state.ts.
generatorNotes: Create src/orchestrator/workflow/errors.ts with `export class MissingKnobError extends Error`, `AgentCapError`, `NonSerializableArgError`, `WorkflowUnavailableError` (the last is used in sprint 6 but define it here). Create src/orchestrator/workflow/types.ts: WorkflowArgs, WorkflowRunResult, ResumeCursor, ConformanceReport exactly as in the architecture's Data Model section (import type PlanSpec from '../../contracts/spec.js' or wherever it lives, SprintContract from '../../contracts/sprint-contract.js', EvalResult + HistoryEntry from '../../contracts/eval-result.js'/'../../state/history.js' — locate the real HistoryEntry type; pendingHistory is Array<Omit<HistoryEntry,'timestamp'>>). Create src/orchestrator/workflow/resume-cursor.ts: `export class ResumeCursorReconstructor { async reconstruct(projectRoot, specId): Promise<ResumeCursor> }` — read all contracts for the spec (from .bober/contracts via existing state helpers; if a load-by-spec helper is missing, glob contract files and filter by specId+status), collect sprintNumbers with status passed/completed into completedSprintNumbers, set lastObservedSprintNumber to the max observed; use loadHistory (history.ts:74) to corroborate but trust contract status on conflict. Create src/orchestrator/workflow/args-builder.ts: `export class ArgsPayloadBuilder { build(userPrompt, config, resumeCursor): WorkflowArgs }`. Pull knobs from config (maxIterations from evaluator.maxIterations, maxSprints from sprint.maxSprints, researchPhase/architectPhase from pipeline, curatorEnabled from curator?.enabled, codeReviewEnabled from codeReview?.enabled, requireContracts from sprint.requireContracts) — throw MissingKnobError if any required one is undefined (don't silently default). models: resolve planner/curator/generator/evaluator model strings from config sections. evaluatorLenses: from config (e.g. derive from evaluator.strategies labels, or ['default']). principles: pass through (caller supplies the principles text; accept a param or read is host-side — keep build pure by accepting principles via config or a param; if reading fs, do it in a separate host method, NOT in build). Cap check: const total = knobs.maxSprints * knobs.maxIterations * evaluatorLenses.length; if (evaluatorLenses.length > 16 || total > 1000) throw new AgentCapError(...). Serializability: try JSON.stringify and compare; throw NonSerializableArgError on failure. Add reconstruct/build unit tests with temp .bober dirs (follow the no-mock-fs principle: create temp dirs, write real contract JSON, clean up). Use import type, ESM .js specifiers, unicode section headers. Conventional commit: bober(sprint-4): add workflow types, ResumeCursorReconstructor, ArgsPayloadBuilder.
evaluatorNotes: Confirm types.ts matches the architecture data model field-for-field (WorkflowArgs.knobs has the 7 knobs; WorkflowRunResult.perSprint entries have contract/finalVerdict/iterationsUsed/outcome/lensVerdicts; pendingHistory omits timestamp). For ResumeCursorReconstructor: write temp contracts with mixed statuses and assert completedSprintNumbers contains only passed/completed numbers; empty dir → []; conflicting history vs status → status wins. For ArgsPayloadBuilder: assert JSON round-trip equality; force a MissingKnobError (config missing a required knob), an AgentCapError (set maxSprints/maxIterations/lenses to exceed caps), and a NonSerializableArgError (inject a function/BigInt model). Run npm run typecheck and npm run build (exit 0); new suites green. Confirm no SDK imports and changes confined to the new workflow files. Tolerate only the flaky tool-count baseline.
